text: 16. Subcontractor shall not cut holes in structural or framing members in a manner that will jeopardize the structural integrity or impact any framing member's ability to support any material or item scheduled to be affixed to applicable framing member.  All holes to be cut by Subcontractor in vertical framing members to accommodate horizontal runs of piping or tubing of any kind shall be approved by Contractor and structural engineer prior to Subcontractor making any cuts.  All holes in vertical members shall be cut to allow for anticipated building movement and in such manner to protect the integrity of piping and tubing passing through any framing member.
